steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “known collectively as the silversword alliance” introduces a name used to identify the plant family as a group.

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content: The phrase does exactly what choice C says: it supplies the name used to refer to the group of related plants. The other choices misread it as listing species (A), explaining uniqueness (B), or naming only one plant (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
